docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $872.56 FILED BY BERGQUIST, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT FUNKE, EMILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
